cmd:
bash -c 
  set -e
  cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/3/src/cuda
  make wrappers CUDA_CC=gfx90a
  cd ..
  go install github.com/mumax/3/...
  echo "BUILD COMPLETE: mumax3 binary at $GOPATH/bin/mumax3"
  ls -la /var/lib/jenkins/go/bin/mumax3 2>/dev/null || echo "mumax3 binary check"

bash -c 
  set -e
  cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/3/src

  echo "=== go test ./cuda/... ==="
  go test -v ./cuda/... 2>&1

  echo ""
  echo "=== go test ./cuda/cu/... ==="
  go test -v ./cuda/cu/... 2>&1

  echo ""
  echo "=== non-GPU tests ./data/... ./httpfs/... ==="
  go test -v ./data/... ./httpfs/... 2>&1

bash -c 
  set -e
  cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/3/src/test
  export GOPATH=/var/lib/jenkins/go
  export PATH=/var/lib/jenkins/goroot/bin:/opt/rocm/bin:$GOPATH/bin:$PATH
  export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0

  echo "=== mumax3 -vet check (176 scripts) ==="
  mumax3 -vet *.mx3
  echo "VET DONE"

bash -c 
  set -e
  cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/3/src/test
  export GOPATH=/var/lib/jenkins/go
  export PATH=/var/lib/jenkins/goroot/bin:/opt/rocm/bin:$GOPATH/bin:$PATH
  export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0

  echo "=== Full test suite (*.go *.mx3) ==="
  mumax3 -paranoid=false -failfast -cache /tmp -http "" -f *.go *.mx3 2>&1
  echo "FULL SUITE DONE"
